nodes.name: Giant weaver
nodes.summary: Giant weaver（Ploceus grandis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Giant weaver。

nodes.name: Giant weaver
nodes.summary: The giant weaver (Ploceus grandis) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is endemic to São Tomé Island. It can climb trees and branches, rather like a treecreeper or sittella. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. References External links Giant weaver - Species text in Weaver Watch.
nodes.shortSummary: The giant weaver (Ploceus grandis) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is endemic to São Tomé Island.

nodes.name: Ploceus
nodes.summary: Ploceus（Ploceus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联64种鸟类，如Yellow-legged weaver、Black-chinned weaver、Bannerman's weaver等64种鸟类。
